title: Reef Rivals: Treasure Tide
description: A three-round tropical projectile battler where tube-riding heroes aim, charge, and outshoot an escalating pirate raft crew.

prompt.objective: Build a tropical aim-and-fire battle between tube heroes and pirates.

mintAssets.brief: A toy reef arena, two crews, floats, raft, cover, weapons, pickups, and effects.
Idle, throw, hit, fall, and victory motions for each crew member.
Pirate music and launch, splash, impact, bonus, win, and defeat cues.

experience: Aim, set power, choose ammo, and trade ballistic shots.
Break cover, knock out crews, choose upgrades, and clear three rounds.
prompt.visualDirection: Bright tropical toy art with bold silhouettes and an arcade HUD.

thumbnail.alt: Two tube-riding heroes face a three-pirate raft crew in the tropical Reef Rivals arena.

social.title: Reef Rivals: Treasure Tide
social.description: A three-round tropical projectile battler where tube-riding heroes aim, charge, and outshoot an escalating pirate raft crew.

image.alt: Two tube-riding heroes face a three-pirate raft crew in the tropical Reef Rivals arena.
